selection_rule:
exp_061 — deterministic item selection from frozen split v1 (post-audit).

Rule (frozen here; metadata-only, no metric scores):

  1. For every class WITH test clips in data/processed/transitions_std121/
     split_v1.json: items = the class's test clips (sorted) — the endpoints
     source for R1 and the prompt source for both arms.
  2. For all-train classes (no test clips): one item = the class's BAR-PAIR
     endpoints clip (clip A = generated_video of sib__<class>), read verbatim
     from the certified certification artifact
     outputs/eval/certification/3.0.0-draft.8/manifests/siblings.json —
     exactly the exp_060 pattern. Classes absent from siblings.json (the n=1
     singletons jump_transition, seamless_transition) use their single clip.
  3. Captions: reused from exp_056/057/058 caption files + exp_060
     captions_extra.json + exp_061 captions_extra.json; any still missing is
     generated by caption_missing.py (exact exp_058/060 captioner).

Writes dataset/selection.json. Login-node / CPU only, stdlib.

items.caption: A figure in a white knit balaclava and bright red hoodie leans against the hood of a blue car in a dusky parking lot, cradling a black motorcycle helmet in red-gloved hands. The scene transforms into a young man with dark hair in an oversized brown shirt smoking a cigarette against a white railing inside a green-lit pedestrian tunnel at night.
A woman in a red bomber jacket poses against a blue studio backdrop, hands on hips. The scene transforms into a shaggy brown dog standing on the same blue backdrop.

A young woman with long, dark hair crouches in the middle of a sunny asphalt street lined with parked cars and trees, wearing a black top, a blue pleated skirt, white socks, and black loafers. The scene transforms into a large black panther with glowing yellow eyes stands on a sunny asphalt street lined with parked cars and green trees under a clear blue sky.

A woman with long black hair and large sunglasses stands in a warm-lit kitchen, wearing a brown leather jacket, a light blue button-down shirt, and a brown skirt while holding a white telephone receiver to her ear. The scene transforms into a woman wearing sunglasses, a leather jacket, and a long skirt stands in a kitchen illuminated by warm orange light, holding a telephone receiver to her ear while red liquid drips down her and the surrounding room.

A blonde woman wearing a black lace top and a cow-print cowboy hat poses in a sunny desert landscape while holding the brim of her hat. The scene transforms into a woman wearing a pink cow-print cowboy hat and a black lace top stands in a desert landscape under a bright sun with falling rain and purple puddles on the ground.

A young blonde woman wearing sunglasses, a black leather jacket with yellow and white stripes, a white crop top, baggy light-blue jeans, and chunky black shoes stands in a dimly lit concrete parking garage next to a blue motorcycle. The scene transforms into a blonde woman wearing sunglasses, a black leather jacket with yellow and white stripes, a white crop top, light blue jeans, and chunky black shoes stands on a concrete floor in front of a massive wall of fluffy pink material.

A woman with voluminous dark curls in a long black leather coat sits on the asphalt leaning against the side of a teal vintage car with whitewall tires in warm afternoon light. The scene transforms into a woman with a sleek gelled curl on her forehead posing in a black hooded deep-plunge romper and stacked silver bracelets against a bare concrete wall.

A young man wearing a blue beanie, a blue varsity jacket, baggy white pants, and white sneakers with pink accents stands in front of a white SUV parked on a city street under soft daylight. The scene transforms into a large, muscular humanoid figure made of rough brown stone stands on an empty city street lined with multi-story buildings under overcast daylight.

A woman with a platinum blonde bob in a black leather jacket over a gray hoodie sits atop a green street-corner newspaper box beneath ONE WAY signs, her silver sneakers and white socks raised against a bright blue sky, seen from a low angle. The scene transforms into a young woman with short brown hair in a green button-up blouse reclining across the seats of a dim night train, one arm raised to a metal pole beneath a glowing orange destination sign.

A woman with long brown hair stands on a black sand beach under a cloudy sky, wearing a long red coat, matching red trousers, and white shoes. The scene transforms into a woman with long reddish-brown hair stands in a desert landscape under a cloudy sky, her outstretched arm and dark red clothing covered in bright, glowing orange cracks that also obscure her face.

A young blonde woman in black cat-eye sunglasses and a white rhinestone-lettered tank top holds an orange lollipop to her mouth in bright sunlight, standing before the huge gray shutter doors of an industrial warehouse. The scene transforms into a woman with long dark hair wearing white headphones and a cropped white t-shirt, leaning against a red-painted pole in a night parking lot beside a red vending machine, hands tucked into her low-slung jeans.

A blonde woman with a short bob, wearing a glossy red latex turtleneck and a sheer black tulle skirt with gold sneakers, crouches on a brick garden wall beside a fruit-laden orange tree with green hills in the distance. The scene transforms into a woman with long windblown dark curls in a fluffy black coat, crouched low in tall grass with her chin resting on folded hands, staring into the camera beneath a cloud-streaked blue sky.

A woman with a black bowl cut and wire glasses crouches on green parkland grass in a black sleeveless dress and long black gloves, holding an open black folding fan beside her head under a clear blue sky. The scene transforms into a woman in a long pink dress standing among rows of moss-green theater seats, holding a black camera up to her face.

A bearded man wearing a white cap, a green cable-knit quarter-zip sweater, blue pants, and white sneakers sits on a yellow fire hydrant next to a road under a clear blue sky. The scene transforms into a bright orange fire hydrant stands on a red curb next to a paved road under a clear blue sky, with a faint, loop-shaped white cloud directly above it and green hills in the background.
A man in a cowboy hat, red jacket and cream trousers leans against a brown corrugated wall. The scene transforms into the empty corrugated wall with a faint haze drifting at the top.

A woman with long dark hair stands in a green grassy field under a clear sky, wearing a bright pink matching sweatshirt and sweatpants set featuring the white number "88" and holding a small pink handbag in the warm sunlight. The scene transforms into a vast green field of grass stretches toward a distant line of trees under a pale, clear sky.

A man with a beard and glasses, wearing a yellow beanie, a cream-colored sweater, and yellow trousers, sits in a cream armchair reading a book in a warm, sunlit room. The scene transforms into a person's arm in a beige knit sweater with a clenched fist is positioned in the foreground against a sunny urban landscape of multi-story buildings under a blue sky.

A man in a green sweater and pink beanie stands outside a Parisian café holding a shopping bag and a pink jacket. The scene transforms into a first-person aerial view above a narrow European street, a green-sleeved arm stretched out ahead.
A man in a black suit crouches against a red graffiti-covered door, staring ahead. The scene transforms into a woman in a white top holding a small black case up to the camera under neon bar lights.
A blonde woman with sunglasses and a headscarf blows a kiss with both hands at her cheeks. The scene transforms into the same portrait drawn as a flat comic illustration in yellow and black.
A young man in a leather jacket and denim shorts leans against a railing by a stone wall. The scene transforms into the same pose drawn as a comic panel in orange and cyan.

A man in an olive-green suit and dark sunglasses stands with hands behind his back on a stone slab amid mossy ancient temple ruins beneath dramatic storm clouds pierced by sunlight. The scene transforms into a man in a black suit and tie with dark sunglasses standing on the pink-tiled deck of a turquoise pool lined with pink loungers and a palm tree under a vivid blue sky.

A blonde woman wearing dark sunglasses and an oversized black leather jacket with a thick orange stripe down the sleeve is pictured at night on a street with cars in the background. The scene transforms into a large crowd of people stands with raised hands facing a brightly lit outdoor concert stage at night, illuminated by glowing orange lights and thick smoke rising above the stage.

A person with dark skin and short curly hair looks over their shoulder on a city street, wearing a grey jacket with a graphic on the back, illuminated by warm sunlight with a yellow construction crane and a modern building in the background. The scene transforms into a person with short dark hair and glowing red eyes looks over their shoulder in a dark, smoky outdoor setting, wearing a dark jacket with a glowing red graphic on the back.

A woman with a dark curly afro dotted with white flowers stands hands-behind-back on cobblestones in a plunging dark-green mini dress with garters and white lace stockings, before the arched wooden doors of a gothic brick building. The scene transforms into a woman with long dark hair and sunglasses bundled in a floor-length shaggy white fur coat, standing on a sunlit driveway between blue and brown wheelie bins in front of a tall hedge.

A person wearing sunglasses, a brown blazer over a patterned shirt, blue trousers, and sandals sits on a green bench inside a boat cabin with wooden floors illuminated by bright sunlight. The scene transforms into a person wearing a brown blazer, a floral shirt, blue trousers, and sunglasses sits on a green cushioned bench inside a boat cabin, surrounded by dollar bills suspended in the air and scattered around them, with water visible through the windows.

A young man wearing a dark coat, dark trousers, and a long grey scarf stands on a large rock in a field of white flowers, with snow-capped mountains under an overcast sky in the background. The scene transforms into a person wearing dark clothing stands on a rocky hill covered in white flowers, with a massive, horned creature partially obscured by a cloud of dust and snow-capped mountains under an overcast sky in the background.

A young Black man with short blonde hair, glasses, and a pearl necklace sits on a chair in front of a draped beige backdrop, wearing a red and black striped tank top, brown trousers, and black boots under warm studio lighting. The scene transforms into a black chair with a metal frame is positioned in the center of a studio setup against a draped, wrinkled beige fabric backdrop.

A young woman with slicked-back dark hair sits in the back seat of a car with beige leather seats, wearing an oversized olive green leather jacket with black lettering, black pants, and a zebra-print shoulder bag. The scene transforms into a young woman with dark hair and thick eyebrows, wearing an olive green leather jacket with large black lettering, is surrounded by tall green grass and wildflowers inside a vehicle under direct lighting.

A man with medium-length black hair wearing a black jacket, an olive green t-shirt, and matching cargo pants leans against a bright orange sports car in front of a grey building. The scene transforms into a large cloud of dark grey smoke is positioned in the middle of a paved city street lined with modern buildings and pedestrians on the sidewalks under an overcast sky.

A young woman with her hair in a bun stands on a cobblestone street in bright daylight, wearing an oversized white graphic t-shirt, a long black skirt, white socks, and black loafers. The scene transforms into a faceted, monochromatic white figure of a woman wearing a long skirt and top stands on a white cobblestone plaza in front of buildings and a patio umbrella, casting a shadow under bright sunlight.

A young woman with long black hair, wearing bright pink undereye makeup, silver chain necklaces, and a blue jacket with white faux fur trim, smiles and shows her braces while touching her lip in front of a wooden paneled wall. The scene transforms into a white, faceted sculpture of a woman with long hair and closed eyes holds her index finger to her lips in front of a vertical wooden paneled wall under bright lighting.

A small, green figure with a glowing yellow mushroom cap and large white eyes stands on a textured tree branch, wearing a dark double-breasted jacket while holding an orange sphere and pointing upward against a blue and green gradient background. The scene transforms into a glossy, bright green droplet is suspended in the air above a rough, textured brown surface against a blue and green gradient background.

A cartoon character with teal hair and a green apron rests their head on their hand while holding a pen over a notebook at a checkout counter inside a dimly lit convenience store with green fluorescent lighting. The scene transforms into a grumpy, potato-like character sits on a counter in a dimly lit convenience store illuminated by green light, with shelves of cartoonish jars in the background and a bright green oval floating in the air.

A pale woman with long dark hair in a black lace bodysuit lies draped along a moss-covered leaning tree trunk in a foggy green meadow ringed by dark pines. The scene transforms into a short-haired youth in a black sleeveless top, camouflage shorts, and black combat boots crouching on a concrete ledge against a deep blue sky, one hand holding a folded newspaper.

A barefoot woman with long brown hair, wearing a red short-sleeved blouse and black pants, runs forward through a hazy parking garage illuminated by green overhead lights and a warm orange glow. The scene transforms into a woman with her hair tied back is engulfed in bright orange flames and captured in a running pose inside a concrete parking garage, illuminated by the intense glow of the fire on her body and a large plume of fire behind her.

A young woman with wavy blonde hair crouches on a city sidewalk, resting her chin on her hand, wearing a black sleeveless top, blue jeans, and sandals, with city buildings and traffic in the background. The scene transforms into a young woman with blonde hair crouches on a city sidewalk in a black top and dark pants with her hands clasped in prayer, while a glowing yellow halo floats above her head, her eyes glow yellow, and bright yellow light rays radiate outward from her hands.

An astronaut in a white spacesuit with a reflective purple visor stands on the metal framework of a skyscraper overlooking a sprawling city filled with tall buildings and billboards under an overcast sky. The scene transforms into an overhead view from the metal edge of a skyscraper rooftop looks down onto a sprawling city skyline filled with tall buildings, streets, and glowing billboards under a cloudy, overcast sky.

A man with glasses, a mustache, and a goatee wears a wet black suit, white shirt, and striped tie while standing under a chrome showerhead with streams of water falling over him against a blue tiled wall. The scene transforms into a young woman with long dark hair stands leaning against a light-colored wall, wearing a beige hoodie under an open plaid jacket, loose olive green pants, and brown suede slip-on shoes on a wooden parquet floor.

A smiling woman in a leather jacket, white top and light jeans sits against an iron fence. The scene transforms into the woman shrouded in a mass of black feathery darkness, only her face and white top still visible.

A man wearing a dark blue hoodie with "PACE CLUB" printed on the front points his index fingers to his face while baring his decorated teeth against a solid blue background. The scene transforms into a figure wrapped in thick, textured black fabric strands is centered against a solid blue background under dim lighting.

A young man with curly dark hair and a mustache, wearing a dark green cardigan over a white collared shirt and a patterned tie, lies in a field of yellow wildflowers below rocky mountains reading a large newspaper, seen from a close low frontal angle. The scene transforms into a bearded man in a black suit and sunglasses riding an orange BMX bike down a sunlit suburban street with his legs spread wide, cars parked along the road behind him.

A teenager in a camouflage bucket hat, dark sunglasses and a red and navy gradient sweatshirt stands under a basketball hoop against a clear blue sky, holding a basketball under one arm, seen from a low angle. The scene transforms into a long-haired young man in a dark jacket, loose blue cargo trousers and teal sneakers climbing on top of a green metal dumpster in bright sunlight, his hair blowing across his face.

A young woman with dark hair stands in a narrow paved alleyway, wearing a black Adidas soccer jersey tucked into a long, ruffled black skirt with a white lace-trimmed apron and a decorative charm belt. The scene transforms into a young woman with long black hair, wearing a black and white athletic jersey and a long black skirt, is in a running pose on a narrow paved path between two tall concrete structures under bright daylight.

A sweaty young Black man with short curly hair and a serious expression looks directly at the camera while wearing a red tank top in a dimly lit indoor setting. The scene transforms into a man wearing a red sleeveless athletic top and matching shorts is positioned in a running stance on an indoor track under bright overhead lighting.

A young woman with long black hair, glasses, and a lollipop in her mouth stretches an open palm toward the camera, wearing a fluffy pink crop top and skirt outside a Japanese storefront hung with red banners and painted signs. The scene transforms into a woman with long black hair shouting into a white megaphone in a bright blue sweater, patterned black-and-white pants, and chunky platform boots on a wide paved plaza before a dark glass building.

A young man with long black hair, wearing a grey beanie, a bright orange patched jacket, and blue jeans, stands with crossed arms while leaning against a metal pole on a city street under natural daylight. The scene transforms into a man with a translucent blue, water-like appearance wearing a matching beanie, shirt, and jeans stands barefoot with his arms crossed on a wet city street.

The lower legs of a person wearing grey trousers and black Salomon sneakers are suspended in the air in an indoor setting with a wooden beam, a white wall, and a tiled wall under harsh flash lighting. The scene transforms into a glowing green grid-patterned outline of a person's legs, pants, and sneakers is depicted against a solid black background.
A green serum bottle sits among cacti on rocks. The scene transforms into the bottle and cacti drawn as a glowing green mesh of lines on a black background.

A young Black man wearing a blue denim jacket, matching jeans, and white sneakers sits on a green utility box on a sunny city sidewalk while holding a phone to his ear, with pedestrians and a storefront with a red awning in the background. The scene transforms into a translucent purple figure of a person wearing a jacket and pants sits on a textured, abstract landscape of purple, green, and black hues.
